common.notFoundDesc: Please check the URL or select a valid example from the list

home.title: Three.js Learning Platform
home.badge: Interactive Examples · Live Code · Progress Tracking
home.subtitle: A Three.js learning platform from basics to advanced, with interactive examples and live code editing

progressive.title: Progressive Learning
progressive.desc: Step-by-step learning path from basic geometry to complex scenes

realtime.title: Real-time Preview
realtime.desc: Edit code online and see 3D effects instantly, immediate feedback on learning progress

rich.title: Rich Examples
rich.desc: Complete examples covering materials, lighting, animation, particles, and more

home.threejsIntro: Three.js is a JavaScript 3D graphics library based on WebGL that makes creating and displaying 3D graphics on the web simple. It provides rich APIs for handling geometry, materials, lighting, animation, and all aspects of 3D graphics.

examples.title: Three.js Examples
examples.selectDesc: Choose an example from the list on the left to view the 3D preview and editable code. You can also mark completion on the progress page.

progress.title: Learning Progress
progress.subtitle: Track your Three.js learning journey
progress.overallDesc: Keep it up! Your learning progress is accumulating

detail.readOnlyTip: Currently read-only, click to switch to editable
detail.editingTip: Currently editable, click to switch to read-only

tree.title: Examples
tree.hint: Click categories to expand and select an example to preview

cube.title: Rotating Cube
cube.description: Create a simple rotating cube and learn basic geometry, materials, and animation

sphere.title: Sphere
sphere.description: Create and render sphere geometry while exploring different material properties

plane.title: Plane
plane.description: Create plane geometry and learn basic plane rendering

materials.title: Materials
materials.description: Explore different material types and their properties

demo.title: Lighting Demo
demo.description: Learn the effects and configuration of different light types

directional.title: Directional Light
directional.description: Learn how to use directional light and shadow effects

point.title: Point Light
point.description: Learn dynamic lighting effects with point lights

demo.title: Animation Demo
demo.description: Learn the basic animation system in Three.js

movement.title: Movement Animation
movement.description: Learn various movement trajectories and path animations

scale.title: Scale Animation
scale.description: Learn various scaling and transformation animations

texture.title: Texture Mapping
texture.description: Learn to create and apply procedural textures

glass.title: Glass Material
glass.description: Learn glass effects in physical materials: transparency, IOR, transmission, and more

rain.title: Rain Particles
rain.description: Create realistic rain particle system effects

stars.title: Star Field
stars.description: Create beautiful starry sky and nebula effects

fire.title: Fire Particles
fire.description: Create realistic fire and burning effects using particle systems

demo.title: 3D Model Showcase
demo.description: Display complex 3D geometry combinations and material effects

bloom.title: Bloom Effect
bloom.description: Create beautiful bloom and glow effects with post-processing

fog.title: Fog Effect
fog.description: Create depth and atmosphere with fog effects

depthOfField.title: Depth of Field
depthOfField.description: Create DSLR-like depth of field blur effects with post-processing

torusKnot.title: Torus Knot
torusKnot.description: Explore complex mathematical surface geometry: the Torus Knot

click.title: Click Interaction
click.description: Learn to implement click and hover interaction effects on objects

custom.title: Custom Shader
custom.description: Use GLSL to write custom vertex and fragment shaders for wave effects

controls.title: Camera Controls
controls.description: Learn OrbitControls: rotate, zoom, and pan operations
